name: cube-match-3d
description: Cube Match 3D - Block elimination puzzle game

scripts.build: cp -f index.html www/ && cp -rf js www/ && cp -rf css www/
scripts.sync: npm run build && npx cap sync android
scripts.deploy: npm run sync && cd android && ./gradlew assembleRelease && cd .. && adb uninstall ai.nextad.cubematch3d; adb install android/app/build/outputs/apk/release/app-release.apk
